synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-3298 Important: Oracle Linux 9 buildah security update
description:
[1.41.8-2.0.1]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117178]

[2:1.41.8-2]
- Rebuild with golang 1.25.7 to fix CVE-2025-68121
- Resolves: RHEL-149617
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-3298

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-3298.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
buildah-1.41.8-2.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
buildah-tests-1.41.8-2.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
buildah-1.41.8-2.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
buildah-tests-1.41.8-2.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/buildah-1.41.8-2.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-61726
CVE-2025-61729
CVE-2025-68121




Description of changes:

[1.41.8-2.0.1]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117178]

[2:1.41.8-2]
- Rebuild with golang 1.25.7 to fix CVE-2025-68121
- Resolves: RHEL-149617
